parts.text:
Review current uncommitted changes for confirmed bugs only.
- Run git diff and inspect modified files in full context.
- Report severity-tagged confirmed issues only.
- If none, state no confirmed bugs.

state.title: Shows full unstaged code diff

state.output:
<path>/Users/nickdejesus/Code/nimbus/packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deploy-provider.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import type { Env, WorkspaceDeploymentStatus } from '../types.js';
2: 
3: export type WorkspaceDeployProviderName = 'simulated' | 'cloudflare_workers_assets';
4: 
5: export interface WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck {
6:   code: string;
7:   ok: boolean;
8:   details?: string;
9: }
10: 
11: export interface WorkspaceDeployCreateInput {
12:   workspaceId: string;
13:   deploymentId: string;
14:   outputDir: string;
15:   outputBundle: {
16:     bytes: Uint8Array;
17:     sha256: string;
18:   };
19: }
20: 
21: export interface WorkspaceDeployCreateResult {
22:   providerDeploymentId: string;
23:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
24:   deployedUrl: string | null;
25: }
26: 
27: export interface WorkspaceDeployStatusResult {
28:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
29:   deployedUrl: string | null;
30:   errorCode?: string;
31:   errorMessage?: string;
32: }
33: 
34: export interface WorkspaceDeployProvider {
35:   readonly name: WorkspaceDeployProviderName;
36:   precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]>;
37:   createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult>;
38:   getDeploymentStatus(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult>;
39:   cancelDeployment(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }>;
40: }
41: 
42: class ProviderError extends Error {
43:   constructor(
44:     public readonly code:
45:       | 'provider_auth_failed'
46:       | 'provider_rate_limited'
47:       | 'provider_project_not_found'
48:       | 'provider_deploy_failed'
49:       | 'provider_invalid_output_dir'
50:       | 'provider_scope_missing',
51:     message: string
52:   ) {
53:     super(message);
54:     this.name = 'ProviderError';
55:   }
56: }
57: 
58: type ProviderFetch = typeof fetch;
59: 
60: let providerFetch: ProviderFetch = fetch;
61: 
62: export function setWorkspaceDeployProviderFetchForTests(fetchImpl: ProviderFetch | null): void {
63:   providerFetch = fetchImpl ?? fetch;
64: }
65: 
66: function parseBoolean(value: string | undefined, fallback: boolean): boolean {
67:   if (value === undefined) {
68:     return fallback;
69:   }
70:   const normalized = value.trim().toLowerCase();
71:   if (normalized === 'true' || normalized === '1' || normalized === 'yes' || normalized === 'on') {
72:     return true;
73:   }
74:   if (normalized === 'false' || normalized === '0' || normalized === 'no' || normalized === 'off') {
75:     return false;
76:   }
77:   return fallback;
78: }
79: 
80: function requireEnv(
81:   value: string | undefined,
82:   key: string,
83:   code: 'provider_auth_failed' | 'provider_scope_missing' | 'provider_deploy_failed' = 'provider_auth_failed'
84: ): string {
85:   if (typeof value !== 'string' || value.trim() === '') {
86:     throw new ProviderError(code, `Missing required provider env: ${key}`);
87:   }
88:   return value.trim();
89: }
90: 
91: function cloudflareErrorsMessage(input: unknown): string | null {
92:   if (!Array.isArray(input)) {
93:     return null;
94:   }
95:   const messages = input
96:     .map((item) => {
97:       if (!item || typeof item !== 'object') {
98:         return null;
99:       }
100:       const record = item as Record<string, unknown>;
101:       if (typeof record.message === 'string' && record.message.trim()) {
102:         return record.message.trim();
103:       }
104:       return null;
105:     })
106:     .filter((value): value is string => Boolean(value));
107:   if (messages.length === 0) {
108:     return null;
109:   }
110:   return messages.join('; ');
111: }
112: 
113: function toBase64(bytes: Uint8Array): string {
114:   const alphabet = 'REDACTED/';
115:   let output = '';
116:   for (let index = 0; index < bytes.length; index += 3) {
117:     const a = bytes[index] ?? 0;
118:     const b = bytes[index + 1] ?? 0;
119:     const c = bytes[index + 2] ?? 0;
120:     const value = (a << 16) | (b << 8) | c;
121:     output += alphabet[(value >> 18) & 63] ?? '';
122:     output += alphabet[(value >> 12) & 63] ?? '';
123:     output += index + 1 < bytes.length ? alphabet[(value >> 6) & 63] ?? '' : '=';
124:     output += index + 2 < bytes.length ? alphabet[value & 63] ?? '' : '=';
125:   }
126:   return output;
127: }
128: 
129: function isValidRelativeOutputDir(value: string): boolean {
130:   if (!value || value === '.') {
131:     return false;
132:   }
133:   if (value.startsWith('/') || value.includes('\\')) {
134:     return false;
135:   }
136:   return value.split('/').every((segment) => Boolean(segment) && segment !== '.' && segment !== '..');
137: }
138: 
139: function mapProviderState(input: string): WorkspaceDeploymentStatus {
140:   const normalized = input.trim().toLowerCase();
141:   if (normalized === 'queued' || normalized === 'pending') {
142:     return 'queued';
143:   }
144:   if (normalized === 'running' || normalized === 'in_progress' || normalized === 'processing') {
145:     return 'running';
146:   }
147:   if (normalized === 'succeeded' || normalized === 'success' || normalized === 'completed' || normalized === 'active') {
148:     return 'succeeded';
149:   }
150:   if (normalized === 'cancelled' || normalized === 'canceled') {
151:     return 'cancelled';
152:   }
153:   return 'failed';
154: }
155: 
156: function dnsSafeLabel(input: string): string {
157:   const lowered = input.trim().toLowerCase();
158:   const replaced = lowered.replace(/[^a-z0-9-]+/g, '-').replace(/-+/g, '-').replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
159:   return replaced || 'deployment';
160: }
161: 
162: class SimulatedWorkspaceDeployProvider implements WorkspaceDeployProvider {
163:   readonly name = 'simulated' as const;
164: 
165:   constructor(private readonly env: Env) {}
166: 
167:   async precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]> {
168:     return [{ code: 'provider_simulated', ok: true, details: 'simulated provider selected' }];
169:   }
170: 
171:   async createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult> {
172:     const deployBase = (this.env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_BASE_URL ?? 'https://deployments.nimbus.local').replace(/\/+$/, '');
173:     return {
174:       providerDeploymentId: input.deploymentId,
175:       status: 'succeeded',
176:       deployedUrl: `${deployBase}/${input.workspaceId}/${input.deploymentId}`,
177:     };
178:   }
179: 
180:   async getDeploymentStatus(_providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {
181:     return { status: 'succeeded', deployedUrl: null };
182:   }
183: 
184:   async cancelDeployment(_providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }> {
185:     return { accepted: true };
186:   }
187: }
188: 
189: class CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider implements WorkspaceDeployProvider {
190:   readonly name = 'cloudflare_workers_assets' as const;
191:   private readonly accountId: string;
192:   private readonly apiToken: string;
193:   private readonly previewDomain: string;
194:   private readonly projectName: string;
195: 
196:   constructor(private readonly env: Env) {
197:     this.accountId = requireEnv(env.CF_ACCOUNT_ID, 'CF_ACCOUNT_ID');
198:     this.apiToken = requireEnv(env.CF_API_TOKEN, 'CF_API_TOKEN');
199:     this.previewDomain = requireEnv(
200:       env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PREVIEW_DOMAIN,
201:       'WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PREVIEW_DOMAIN',
202:       'provider_deploy_failed'
203:     );
204:     this.projectName = requireEnv(
205:       env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME,
206:       'WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME',
207:       'provider_deploy_failed'
208:     );
209: 
210:     if (!parseBoolean(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_REAL_PROVIDER_ENABLED, false)) {
211:       throw new ProviderError(
212:         'provider_deploy_failed',
213:         'Real deploy provider is disabled; set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_REAL_PROVIDER_ENABLED=true to enable'
214:       );
215:     }
216:   }
217: 
218:   private request(path: string, init?: RequestInit, authToken?: string): Promise<Response> {
219:     const headers = new Headers(init?.headers ?? {});
220:     if (!headers.has('Authorization')) {
221:       headers.set('Authorization', `Bearer ${authToken ?? this.apiToken}`);
222:     }
223:     if (!headers.has('Content-Type') && !(init?.body instanceof FormData)) {
224:       headers.set('Content-Type', 'application/json');
225:     }
226:     return providerFetch(`https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4${path}`, {
227:       ...init,
228:       headers,
229:     });
230:   }
231: 
232:   private async parseCloudflareResult(response: Response): Promise<Record<string, unknown>> {
233:     const text = await response.text();
234:     let parsed: Record<string, unknown> = {};
235:     try {
236:       parsed = JSON.parse(text) as Record<string, unknown>;
237:     } catch {
238:       parsed = {};
239:     }
240: 
241:     if (response.status === 401) {
242:       throw new ProviderError('provider_auth_failed', 'Cloudflare API token is invalid');
243:     }
244:     if (response.status === 403) {
245:       throw new ProviderError('provider_scope_missing', 'Cloudflare API token is missing required scopes');
246:     }
247:     if (response.status === 404) {
248:       throw new ProviderError('provider_project_not_found', `Cloudflare project ${this.projectName} was not found`);
249:     }
250:     if (response.status === 429) {
251:       throw new ProviderError('provider_rate_limited', 'Cloudflare API rate limit exceeded');
252:     }
253:     if (!response.ok) {
254:       const errorMessage =
255:         cloudflareErrorsMessage(parsed.errors) ??
256:         (typeof parsed.errors === 'object' && parsed.errors !== null
257:           ? JSON.stringify(parsed.errors)
258:           : text || `Cloudflare API request failed with status ${response.status}`);
259:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', errorMessage);
260:     }
261: 
262:     if (parsed.success === false) {
263:       const errorMessage =
264:         cloudflareErrorsMessage(parsed.errors) ??
265:         `Cloudflare API reported success=false${response.status ? ` (status ${response.status})` : ''}`;
266:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', errorMessage);
267:     }
268: 
269:     return parsed;
270:   }
271: 
272:   private previewUrlForDeployment(deploymentId: string): string {
273:     return `https://dep-${dnsSafeLabel(deploymentId)}.${this.previewDomain}`;
274:   }
275: 
276:   private static readonly assetsMainModule = 'nimbus-assets-entry.mjs';
277:   private static readonly scriptUpdateDeploymentPrefix = 'script-update:';
278: 
279:   private static assetsWorkerSource(): string {
280:     return 'export default { async fetch(request, env) { return env.ASSETS.fetch(request); } };';
281:   }
282: 
283:   private static scriptUpdateProviderDeploymentId(deploymentId: string): string {
284:     return `${CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.scriptUpdateDeploymentPrefix}${deploymentId}`;
285:   }
286: 
287:   private static deploymentIdFromScriptUpdateProviderId(providerDeploymentId: string): string | null {
288:     if (!providerDeploymentId.startsWith(CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.scriptUpdateDeploymentPrefix)) {
289:       return null;
290:     }
291:     const value = providerDeploymentId.slice(CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.scriptUpdateDeploymentPrefix.length).trim();
292:     return value ? value : null;
293:   }
294: 
295:   private async probePreviewUrl(url: string): Promise<'reachable' | 'missing' | 'unknown'> {
296:     const controller = new AbortController();
297:     const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort('preview_url_probe_timeout'), 2_000);
298:     try {
299:       const response = await providerFetch(url, {
300:         method: 'GET',
301:         redirect: 'manual',
302:         signal: controller.signal,
303:       });
304:       if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 400) {
305:         return 'reachable';
306:       }
307:       if (response.status === 404) {
308:         return 'missing';
309:       }
310:       return 'unknown';
311:     } catch {
312:       return 'unknown';
313:     } finally {
314:       clearTimeout(timeout);
315:     }
316:   }
317: 
318:   private static toManifestHash(sha256: string): string {
319:     const normalized = sha256.trim().toLowerCase();
320:     const hex = normalized.replace(/[^a-f0-9]/g, '');
321:     return (hex.slice(0, 32) || '0'.repeat(32)).padEnd(32, '0');
322:   }
323: 
324:   private static completionJwtFromUploadResponse(parsed: Record<string, unknown>): string | null {
325:     const topLevel = typeof parsed.jwt === 'string' && parsed.jwt.trim() ? parsed.jwt.trim() : null;
326:     if (topLevel) {
327:       return topLevel;
328:     }
329:     if (typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null) {
330:       const resultJwt = (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>).jwt;
331:       if (typeof resultJwt === 'string' && resultJwt.trim()) {
332:         return resultJwt.trim();
333:       }
334:     }
335:     return null;
336:   }
337: 
338:   private async deployScriptWithAssetsJwt(completionJwt: string): Promise<Record<string, unknown>> {
339:     const metadata = {
340:       main_module: CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.assetsMainModule,
341:       compatibility_date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10),
342:       assets: {
343:         jwt: completionJwt,
344:       },
345:       bindings: [
346:         {
347:           name: 'ASSETS',
348:           type: 'assets',
349:         },
350:       ],
351:     };
352:     const form = new FormData();
353:     form.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));
354:     form.append(
355:       CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.assetsMainModule,
356:       new Blob([CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.assetsWorkerSource()], {
357:         type: 'application/javascript+module',
358:       }),
359:       CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.assetsMainModule
360:     );
361: 
362:     const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}`, {
363:       method: 'PUT',
364:       body: form,
365:     });
366:     return this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
367:   }
368: 
369:   async precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]> {
370:     const checks: WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[] = [];
371:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_real_enabled', ok: true });
372:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_credentials_present', ok: true });
373: 
374:     const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}`);
375:     await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
376:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_project_access', ok: true });
377:     return checks;
378:   }
379: 
380:   async createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult> {
381:     if (!isValidRelativeOutputDir(input.outputDir)) {
382:       throw new ProviderError(
383:         'provider_invalid_output_dir',
384:         'deploy.outputDir must be a safe non-root relative directory path'
385:       );
386:     }
387: 
388:     const assetPath = `/__nimbus/${dnsSafeLabel(input.deploymentId)}.tar.gz`;
389:     const manifestHash = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.toManifestHash(input.outputBundle.sha256);
390:     const sessionResponse = await this.request(
391:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/assets-upload-session`,
392:       {
393:         method: 'POST',
394:         body: JSON.stringify({
395:           manifest: {
396:             [assetPath]: {
397:               hash: manifestHash,
398:               size: input.outputBundle.bytes.byteLength,
399:             },
400:           },
401:         }),
402:       }
403:     );
404:     const sessionParsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(sessionResponse);
405:     const sessionResult =
406:       typeof sessionParsed.result === 'object' && sessionParsed.result !== null
407:         ? (sessionParsed.result as Record<string, unknown>)
408:         : {};
409:     const uploadJwt =
410:       typeof sessionResult.jwt === 'string' && sessionResult.jwt.trim() ? sessionResult.jwt.trim() : null;
411:     if (!uploadJwt) {
412:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Cloudflare asset upload session did not return a JWT');
413:     }
414: 
415:     const bucketSets = Array.isArray(sessionResult.buckets) ? sessionResult.buckets : [];
416:     const shouldUpload = bucketSets.some((bucket) => Array.isArray(bucket) && bucket.some((value) => value === manifestHash));
417: 
418:     let uploadParsed: Record<string, unknown> | null = null;
419:     if (shouldUpload) {
420:       const uploadForm = new FormData();
421:       uploadForm.append(manifestHash, toBase64(input.outputBundle.bytes));
422:       const uploadResponse = await this.request(
423:         `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/assets/upload?base64=true`,
424:         {
425:           method: 'POST',
426:           body: uploadForm,
427:         },
428:         uploadJwt
429:       );
430:       uploadParsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(uploadResponse);
431:     }
432: 
433:     const completionJwt =
434:       (uploadParsed ? CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.completionJwtFromUploadResponse(uploadParsed) : null) ??
435:       CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.completionJwtFromUploadResponse(sessionParsed);
436:     if (!completionJwt) {
437:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Cloudflare asset upload did not return a completion JWT');
438:     }
439: 
440:     let parsed: Record<string, unknown>;
441:     let createStatus: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus = 'running';
442:     let fallbackScriptUpdate = false;
443:     try {
444:       const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments`, {
445:         method: 'POST',
446:         body: JSON.stringify({
447:           deployment_id: input.deploymentId,
448:           alias: `dep-${dnsSafeLabel(input.deploymentId)}`,
449:           output_dir: input.outputDir,
450:           assets: {
451:             jwt: completionJwt,
452:             manifest: {
453:               [assetPath]: {
454:                 hash: manifestHash,
455:                 size: input.outputBundle.bytes.byteLength,
456:               },
457:             },
458:           },
459:           preview_url: this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
460:         }),
461:       });
462:       parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
463:     } catch (error) {
464:       const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
465:       if (
466:         providerError.code === 'provider_deploy_failed' &&
467:         providerError.message.toLowerCase().includes('invalid for field "versions"')
468:       ) {
469:         parsed = await this.deployScriptWithAssetsJwt(completionJwt);
470:         fallbackScriptUpdate = true;
471:       } else {
472:         throw error;
473:       }
474:     }
475:     const result =
476:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
477:     const providerDeploymentId = fallbackScriptUpdate
478:       ? CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.scriptUpdateProviderDeploymentId(input.deploymentId)
479:       : typeof result.id === 'string' && result.id.trim()
480:         ? result.id.trim()
481:         : `cfdep_${input.deploymentId}`;
482: 
483:     return {
484:       providerDeploymentId,
485:       status: createStatus,
486:       deployedUrl: fallbackScriptUpdate ? null : this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
487:     };
488:   }
489: 
490:   async getDeploymentStatus(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {
491:     const scriptUpdateDeploymentId = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.deploymentIdFromScriptUpdateProviderId(providerDeploymentId);
492:     if (scriptUpdateDeploymentId) {
493:       const url = this.previewUrlForDeployment(scriptUpdateDeploymentId);
494:       const probe = await this.probePreviewUrl(url);
495:       if (probe === 'reachable') {
496:         return {
497:           status: 'succeeded',
498:           deployedUrl: url,
499:         };
500:       }
501:       if (probe === 'missing') {
502:         return {
503:           status: 'failed',
504:           deployedUrl: null,
505:           errorCode: 'provider_deploy_failed',
506:           errorMessage: 'Fallback script update succeeded but preview URL alias is not reachable',
507:         };
508:       }
509:       return {
510:         status: 'running',
511:         deployedUrl: null,
512:       };
513:     }
514:     if (providerDeploymentId.startsWith('script_update_')) {
515:       return {
516:         status: 'running',
517:         deployedUrl: null,
518:       };
519:     }
520: 
521:     const response = await this.request(
522:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}`
523:     );
524: 
525:     if (response.status === 404) {
526:       return {
527:         status: 'running',
528:         deployedUrl: null,
529:       };
530:     }
531: 
532:     const parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
533:     const result =
534:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
535:     const hasVersions = Array.isArray(result.versions) && result.versions.length > 0;
536:     let state: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
537:     if (typeof result.status === 'string') {
538:       const mapped = mapProviderState(result.status);
539:       state = mapped === 'running' && hasVersions ? 'succeeded' : mapped;
540:     } else {
541:       state = hasVersions ? 'succeeded' : 'running';
542:     }
543:     return {
544:       status: state,
545:       deployedUrl: typeof result.preview_url === 'string' && result.preview_url.trim() ? result.preview_url : null,
546:       errorCode: typeof result.error_code === 'string' ? result.error_code : undefined,
547:       errorMessage: typeof result.error_message === 'string' ? result.error_message : undefined,
548:     };
549:   }
550: 
551:   async cancelDeployment(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }> {
552:     if (CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.deploymentIdFromScriptUpdateProviderId(providerDeploymentId)) {
553:       return { accepted: false };
554:     }
555:     if (providerDeploymentId.startsWith('script_update_')) {
556:       return { accepted: false };
557:     }
558: 
559:     const response = await this.request(
560:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}/cancel`,
561:       { method: 'POST', body: '{}' }
562:     );
563: 
564:     if (response.status === 404 || response.status === 409) {
565:       return { accepted: false };
566:     }
567: 
568:     await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
569:     return { accepted: true };
570:   }
571: }
572: 
573: export function getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(input: unknown, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProviderName {
574:   if (typeof input === 'string' && input.trim()) {
575:     const normalizedInput = input.trim();
576:     if (normalizedInput === 'simulated' || normalizedInput === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
577:       return normalizedInput;
578:     }
579:   }
580: 
581:   const configured = typeof env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER === 'string' ? env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER.trim() : '';
582:   if (configured === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
583:     return 'cloudflare_workers_assets';
584:   }
585: 
586:   return 'simulated';
587: }
588: 
589: export function getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env: Env): string | null {
590:   const configured = typeof env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER === 'string' ? env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER.trim() : '';
591:   if (!configured || configured === 'simulated' || configured === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
592:     return null;
593:   }
594:   return `Invalid WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER value: ${configured}. Use simulated or cloudflare_workers_assets.`;
595: }
596: 
597: export function createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName: WorkspaceDeployProviderName, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProvider {
598:   if (providerName === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
599:     return new CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider(env);
600:   }
601:   return new SimulatedWorkspaceDeployProvider(env);
602: }
603: 
604: export function normalizeProviderError(error: unknown): { code: string; message: string } {
605:   if (error instanceof ProviderError) {
606:     return { code: error.code, message: error.message };
607:   }
608: 
609:   if (error instanceof Error) {
610:     return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: error.message };
611:   }
612: 
613:   return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: String(error) };
614: }

(End of file - total 614 lines)
</content>
state.title: packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deploy-provider.ts

parts.text:
- **[High] Legacy `script_update_` deployments are now stuck in `running` forever**  
  In `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deploy-provider.ts:514`, the `providerDeploymentId.startsWith('script_update_')` branch was changed from reachability-based completion to unconditional `{ status: 'running' }`. That makes these deployment IDs unable to ever report `succeeded` or `failed`, so polling clients will never see terminal state for that ID format.
